_comment: Frames whose global name is required. Everything else should be anonymous: naming a templated frame also creates a global per named child the template defines.

namedFrames.PeaversTalentsExportDialog: registered in UISpecialFrames, which resolves the frame via _G[name] on ESC (registered via dialog:GetName())
namedFrames.PeaversTalentsApplyMenu: UIDropDownMenuTemplate addresses its button/text children by global name
namedFrames.PeaversTalentsExportButton: ButtonFix re-runs when the talent frame is rebuilt and uses _G[name] to avoid creating a second button
